The '''54th''' annual '''[[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' was held from 5–15 February 2004.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2004/01_jahresblatt_2004/01_Jahresblatt_2004.html |title=54TH BERLIN INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL FEBRUARY 5 - 15, 2004 |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20140419102256/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2004/01_jahresblatt_2004/01_Jahresblatt_2004.html| archive-date=19 April 2014 | url-status= live}}</ref> The festival opened with out of competition film ''[[Cold Mountain (film)|Cold Mountain]]'' by [[Anthony Minghella]].<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.theguardian.com/film/2004/feb/05/festivals.berlinfilmfestival2004 |title=Cold Mountain opens Berlin festival |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de|date=5 February 2004 }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://filmmakermagazine.com/1467-berlinale-2004-competition/ |title=BERLINALE 2004 COMPETITION |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=filmmakermagazine.com |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130921052203/http://filmmakermagazine.com/1467-berlinale-2004-competition/ |archive-date=21 September 2013 |url-status=dead |df=dmy-all }}</ref> ''[[25 Degrees in Winter]]'' by Stéphane Vuillet served as the closing film.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2004/08_pressemitteilungen_2004/08_Pressemitteilungen_2004-Detail_653.html |title=BERLINALE 2004: COMPETITION SELECTION NOW COMPLETE|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20110109111643/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2004/08_pressemitteilungen_2004/08_Pressemitteilungen_2004-Detail_653.html| archive-date=9 January 2011 | url-status= live}}</ref>

The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to ''[[Head-On (film)|Head-On]]'' directed by [[Fatih Akın]].<ref name="PRIZES" />

The retrospective dedicated to films from 1967 to 1976 titled ''New Hollywood 1967-1976. Trouble in Wonderland'' was shown at the festival.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html#|title=RETROSPECTIVE|access-date=28 August 2014|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170304113847/http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html|archive-date=4 March 2017|url-status=dead|df=dmy-all}}</ref> It focuses on the films from the period known as [[New Hollywood|New Hollywood or American New Wave]], and attended by some of the film-makers and actors of that era including [[Peter Davis (director)|Peter Davis]], [[Peter Fonda]], [[William Greaves]], [[Monte Hellman]] and [[Melvin Van Peebles]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2004/08_pressemitteilungen_2004/08_Pressemitteilungen_2004-Detail_610.html |title=NEW HOLLYWOOD 1967–1976. TROUBLE IN WONDERLAND - EVENTS AND GUESTS AT THE RETROSPECTIVE|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20090214150317/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2004/08_pressemitteilungen_2004/08_Pressemitteilungen_2004-Detail_610.html| archive-date=14 February 2009 | url-status= live}}</ref>

== Juries ==
[[File:Frances McDormand 2015 (cropped).jpg|thumb|218x218px|[[Frances McDormand]], Jury President]]

The following people were announced as being on the jury for the festival:<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2004/04_jury_2004/04_Jury_2004.html |title=JURIES 2004 |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131023125449/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2004/04_jury_2004/04_Jury_2004.html| archive-date=23 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>

===Main Competition===
* [[Frances McDormand]], American actress - Jury President
* [[Maji-da Abdi]], Ethiopian filmmaker and producer
* [[Valeria Bruni Tedeschi]], Italian actress
* [[Samira Makhmalbaf]], Iranian filmmaker
* Peter Rommel, German producer
* [[Gabriele Salvatores]], Italian filmmaker
* Dan Talbot, American distributor

=== Short Films Competition ===
* Christine Dollhofer, Austrian journalist and event creator
* Sophie Maintigneux, French director of photography
* Vinca Wiedemann, Danish producer

==Official Awards==
[[File:Fatih Akin (Berlin Film Festival 2011).jpg|thumb|200px|[[Fatih Akın]], winner of the [[Golden Bear]] at the festival]]
===Main Competition===
The following prizes were awarded by the Jury:<ref name="PRIZES">{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2004/03_preistr_ger_2004/03_Preistraeger_2004.html |title=PRIZES & HONOURS 2004|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131015122050/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2004/03_preistr_ger_2004/03_Preistraeger_2004.html| archive-date=15 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/service_7/vor_55_ifb/54_IFB_Awards_2004.pdf |title=Awards & Announcement|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130516140309/http://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/service_7/vor_55_ifb/54_IFB_Awards_2004.pdf| archive-date=16 May 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>
*[[Golden Bear]]: ''[[Head-On (film)|Head-On]]'' by [[Fatih Akın]]
*[[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize|Silver Bear Jury Grand Prix]]: ''[[Lost Embrace]]'' by [[Daniel Burman]]
*[[Silver Bear for Best Director]]: [[Kim Ki-duk]] for ''[[Samaritan Girl]]''
*[[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]:
**[[Catalina Sandino Moreno]] for ''[[Maria Full of Grace]]''
**[[Charlize Theron]] for [[Monster (2003 film)|''Monster'']]
*[[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: [[Daniel Hendler]] for ''[[Lost Embrace]]''
*'''Silver Bear for Best Film Music''': Banda Osiris for ''First Love''
*'''Silver Bear for Outstanding Artistic Achievement''': Leif Andrée, Pernilla August, Jan Coster, Jakob Eklund, Ingvar Hirdwall, Magnus Krepper, Johan Kvarnström, Camilla Larsson, Marika Lindström, Peter Lorentzon, Hampus Penttinen, Ann Petrén, Marie Richardson, Jenny Svärdsäter, Claes-Göran Turesson for ''Daybreak''

=== [[Golden Bear#Golden Bear .E2.80.93 Honorary Award|Honorary Golden Bear]] ===
*[[Fernando E. Solanas]]

=== Short Films Competition ===
*[[Short Film Golden Bear]]: ''Cigarettes and Coffee'' by [[Cristi Puiu]]
*'''Silver Bear''': ''Great!'' by Karin Junger, Brigit Hillenius
*'''Honorable Mention''': ''Public/Private'' by Christoph Behl

=== Berlinale Camera ===
*Willy Sommerfeld
*[[Regina Ziegler]]
*Erika Rabau
*Rolf Bähr

== Independent Awards ==

=== Panorama Audience Award ===
*'''Best Feature Film''': ''Addicted to Acting'' by [[Andres Veiel]]
*'''Best Short Film''': ''Passing Hearts'' by [[Johan Brisinger]]

=== Crystal Bear ===
*'''Best Short Film''': ''[[Stormy Night (2003 film)|Stormy Night]]'' by [[Michèle Lemieux]]
**'''Special Mention''':
***''Circuit marine'' by Isabelle Favez
***''Maree'' by James Pellerito
*'''Best Feature Film''': ''[[Magnifico (film)|Magnifico]]'' by Maryo J. De Los Reyes
**'''Special Mention''':
***''The Blind Flyers by'' Bernd Sahling
***''[[Raining Cats and Frogs]]'' by Jacques-Rémy Girerd
*'''14plus: Best Feature Film''': ''[[The Wooden Camera]]'' by Ntshaveni Wa Luruli
**'''Special Mention''': ''Quality of Life'' by Benjamin Morgan

=== [[International Federation of Film Critics#FIPRESCI Award|FIPRESCI Award]] ===
*''[[Head-On (film)|Head-On]]'': [[Fatih Akın]]
